tweet_text: 🚨 Liverpool and Wales legend John Toshack, 77, has been diagnosed with dementia, confirmed by his son Cameron. Toshack, a football icon, had a stellar playing and managerial career. 💔⚽ #FootballLegend #DementiaAwareness
article_title: Liverpool and Wales legend John Toshack diagnosed with dementia

article_title: Man who racially abused Lionesses hero Jess Carter with vile messages avoids jail
